title: CcdcRecipe
description:
A SEPAL CCDC (Continuous Change Detection and Classification) recipe. Fits a per-pixel piecewise harmonic regression model over a time series and detects breakpoints where the model fit no longer holds.

**Outputs.** A complex multi-band image carrying per-segment intercept, slope, and harmonic coefficients (annual, biannual, triannual) per breakpoint band, plus break dates. The output is typically consumed via `CCDC_SLICE` to render synthetic imagery at a chosen date.

**Pipeline.** (1) Filter the time series of `sources.breakpointBands` over the AOI and date range. (2) Run EE's `ee.Algorithms.TemporalSegmentation.Ccdc` per pixel with `ccdcOptions`. (3) Persist segment coefficients and breaks.

breakpointBands.description: Bands used for break detection. Common: `ndfi`, `ndvi`, `nbr`, `swir1`, `nir`. Default `['ndfi']`.

options.title: CcdcOptions
options.description: Optical / radar / planet processing options. Loosely structured; the applicable subset depends on the selected dataSets.

ccdcOptions.title: CcdcAlgorithmOptions
ccdcOptions.description: Tuning parameters for `ee.Algorithms.TemporalSegmentation.Ccdc`. The GUI exposes 3 presets (conservative, moderate, aggressive) which differ in `minObservations` and `chiSquareProbability`.

dateFormat.description: Output date encoding: `0` = jDays, `1` = fractional years, `2` = unix time (ms). Default `1` (fractional years).

minObservations.description: Minimum observations required before fitting a segment. Conservative=6, Moderate=6, Aggressive=4.

chiSquareProbability.description: Chi-square probability threshold for break detection. Conservative=0.99, Moderate=0.9, Aggressive=0.75.

minNumOfYearsScaler.description: Minimum-years scaler. Default `1.33` for all presets.
